title: Beyond-spec tools: club_player_breakdown, list_seasons, team_rankings, biggest_wins
evidence: src/server.ts:154 club_player_breakdown, src/server.ts:214 list_seasons, src/server.ts:280 team_rankings, src/server.ts:258 biggest_wins — four tools beyond the 12 pinned requirements
suggestion: Enhancements that add value beyond the minimum spec

title: Cross-source deduplication with stats grafting
evidence: src/data/loader.ts:247-280 dedupeMatches merges overlapping CSV sources and grafts BR-Football extended stats onto canonical rows
suggestion: Robust data handling that avoids double-counting across the 5 match sources

title: Comprehensive team name normalization with canonical aliases
evidence: src/data/normalize.ts:42-59 CANONICAL alias table covers 16 major clubs; src/data/normalize.ts:103 teamKey handles state suffixes, accents, and country codes
suggestion: Handles all spec-noted naming variants (Palmeiras-SP, Palmeiras, etc.)

title: Relegation query support computed from standings
evidence: src/services/competitions.ts:129-138 relegated() returns bottom N teams; src/server.ts:204 standings tool includes relegationCount param
suggestion: Addresses the spec example 'Which teams were relegated in 2020?' beyond explicit requirements

title: BDD-style tests with real CSV data integration
evidence: tests/matches.test.ts:1-87 uses describe/it with Given/When/Then naming; tests/fixture.ts loads actual data/kaggle CSVs
suggestion: Tests verify real data integration, not just mocks — validates against actual Kaggle datasets
